name: vendor-development-expert
description: Industrial product supplier development expert: search authorized distributors, verify via Qichacha, batch create and bind to WKEA system.

displayDescription.en: End-to-end industrial supplier lifecycle: search brand websites, extract distributor lists with completeness checks, verify via Qichacha, batch create and bind brands/categories in WKEA.
displayDescription.zh: 工业品供应商全生命周期管理：从品牌官网搜索授权代理商并核验，批量创建并绑定到 WKEA 后台，沉淀业务方法论与踩坑经验。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 请告诉本专家你要开发或管理哪家供应商（可提供品牌名/Logo/网址/图片）
defaultInitPrompt.en: Tell the expert which supplier to develop or manage (brand name / logo / URL / image)

quickPrompts.zh: 请告诉本专家你要开发或管理哪家供应商（可提供品牌名/Logo/网址/图片）
quickPrompts.en: Tell the expert which supplier to develop or manage (brand name / logo / URL / image)

quickPrompts.zh: 查一下「上海某某有限公司」这个供应商的详情
quickPrompts.en: Look up the supplier 'Shanghai XXX Co., Ltd.'

quickPrompts.zh: 帮我开发 SMC 品牌的供应商，至少找到 5 家
quickPrompts.en: Help me develop suppliers for SMC brand, find at least 5
